Keep the lion's share of every booking. We charge travelers, not you.

How It Works

1

Apply

Complete the partner application in about 5 minutes. Tell us about your business and experiences.
2

Get Approved

Our team reviews your application within 24 hours and verifies your business details.
3

Set Up

Create your profile, upload photos, set your pricing, and configure availability.
4

Go Live

Your experiences are immediately visible to travelers searching for authentic Thailand experiences.
5

Earn

Receive bookings and get paid within 24–48 hours. Keep 80–85% of every booking.

Ready to Grow Your Business?

Join 614+ partners across Thailand. Apply in 5 minutes and start earning more from every booking.
